name: Sarah
observedShift: She is always late to work

focusPoints.label: Punctuality and its impact on workload.
focusPoints.reason: Notes mention she is always late to work. Worth exploring if this is affecting her workload management or team dynamics.

focusPoints.label: Work in flight this cycle.
focusPoints.reason: Standard bi-weekly anchor — she needs space to surface what she is actually shipping, independent of the punctuality issue.

focusPoints.label: What she'd want more of from you.
focusPoints.reason: Bi-weekly hygiene at this seniority — the cleanest channel for her to redirect the relationship if something is off.
